description: Designed for the day hiker, the Arpenaz 20 from quechua is perfect for those short weekend getaways. Though waterproof, it's advisable to use additional protection in rainy conditions.Capacity: 21 litresWeight: 520 gWarranty: 5 years Made of 100% polyester with a nylon lining for durability and comfort Padded with 100% polyethylene for enhanced comfort and durability One inner zipped pocket with two outer zipped pockets to stash away essentials One meshed open pocket on the outside to hold quick essentials like a water bottle, a book etc. One flap pocket to hold mobile chargers, soiled inners etc. Foldaway belt for added comfort Pole holder to evenly distribute weight and enhance bag life Foam back with tensioners and padded straps to protect the shoulders and back Chest strap for easy use when hiking Thumb loops to rest on the bag when walking Draw cord to close bag mouth CareStore backpack in a dry placeDo not machine wash, tumble dry, dry clean, bleach or ironHand wash using luke warm soapy waterUse waterproofing spray after a few years to renew water-repellant property of the fabric
